Package pjv.controller

Class Server

java.lang.Object
pjv.controller.Server
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.lang.Runnable
public class Server
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Runnable
This class contains methods where new instance of ServerSocket is created. Then it creates server Socket instance and waits for incoming client connections. Each successfully accepted connection from the client is handled in new thread.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Michal Pechník and Oľga Ostashchuk

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    Server​(int port)
    The Server class constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void clearClients()
    The method sends warning message to all connected clients and removes all clients from the database.
    void endServer()
    This method closes server socket.
    static java.util.ArrayList<ClientHandler> getClientHandlers()
    This method gets list of all ClientHandler instances.
    java.net.ServerSocket getServer()
    This method gets ServerSocket instance.
    java.net.Socket getSocket()
    This method gets Socket instance.
    static void removeChatRoom​(java.lang.String chatRoomName)
    This method removes existing chatRoom with specified name, all clients of this chatRoom and all messages sent in this chatRoom.
    static void removeClient​(Client client)
    This method sends warning message to client and removes client from the database.
    void run()
    The method overrides run() method of the Runnable interface.
    void setServer​(java.net.ServerSocket server)
    This method sets ServerSocket instance.
    void setSocket​(java.net.Socket socket)
    This method sets Socket instance.
    void waitForNewClients()
    This method waits for incoming clients and accepted connection handles in new thread.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Server

      public Server​(int port)
      The Server class constructor. It initializes ServerSocket instance with specified port number and stop variable.
      Parameters:
      port - int specified port number for ServerSocket instance

  • Method Details

    • waitForNewClients

      public void waitForNewClients()
      This method waits for incoming clients and accepted connection handles in new thread.

    • removeChatRoom

      public static void removeChatRoom​(java.lang.String chatRoomName) throws java.lang.Exception
      This method removes existing chatRoom with specified name, all clients of this chatRoom and all messages sent in this chatRoom.
      Parameters:
      chatRoomName - String specified name of existing chatRoom
      Throws:
      java.lang.Exception - if ChatRoom instance with specified name is not in the database.

    • removeClient

      public static void removeClient​(Client client)
      This method sends warning message to client and removes client from the database.
      Parameters:
      client - Client specified client

    • run

      public void run()
      The method overrides run() method of the Runnable interface. It handles incoming messages from the client and sends them to all clients of the same chatRoom connected to the server.
      Specified by:
      run in interface java.lang.Runnable

    • getClientHandlers

      public static java.util.ArrayList<ClientHandler> getClientHandlers()
      This method gets list of all ClientHandler instances.
      Returns:
      list of ClientHandler instances

    • endServer

      public void endServer()
      This method closes server socket.

    • clearClients

      public void clearClients()
      The method sends warning message to all connected clients and removes all clients from the database.

    • getServer

      public java.net.ServerSocket getServer()
      This method gets ServerSocket instance.
      Returns:
      ServerSocket instance

    • setServer

      public void setServer​(java.net.ServerSocket server)
      This method sets ServerSocket instance.
      Parameters:
      server - ServerSocket

    • getSocket

      public java.net.Socket getSocket()
      This method gets Socket instance.
      Returns:
      Socket instance

    • setSocket

      public void setSocket​(java.net.Socket socket)
      This method sets Socket instance.
      Parameters:
      socket - Socket
